basis: CIF NWE / Dated Brent physical proxy
note: Physical North West European crude still trades above Brent futures. The post-deal premium eased sharply after the US–Iran memorandum, but has partly firmed again as renewed Israel–Lebanon escalation and the postponed Switzerland talks put the de-escalation trade on hold — while staying well below the war-premium levels of the acute Hormuz phase. Paper crude has settled in the low-$80s; physical NWE barrels retain only a modest prompt-delivery premium because tanker flows, insurance confidence and Gulf export logistics have not fully normalised.
